Our outdoor pots already have holes. Our inside pots do not have pre-drilled holes. You can place your plant with the inner pot directly into all our indoor pots. Are the elho pots weather resistant? We make products in which plastic comes into its own. We, therefore, warrant that our pots are UV-resistant, frost-resistant and that the colour will last. Are all elho products made from recycled materials? We continually strive for the most sustainable production methods. That's why we currently use 100% recycled plastic. Every day, we look for new solutions to create products in an even more sustainable way, making your life greener. What exactly does elho recycle to produce pots? The most important raw material is the plastic used by various companies that ends up as unused waste from their production processes and the elho pots that roll off the conveyor belt when machines are started up or with colour changes.
